cc.quaternion.potshaper.Pot3DFormat.Rotation

  • Uses of Pot3DFormat.Rotation in cc.quaternion.potshaper

    Methods in cc.quaternion.potshaper that return Pot3DFormat.Rotation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Pot3DFormat.Rotation
    Pot3DFormat.Rotation.perspective(double x, double y)
    Sets both the X and Y rotation angles simultaneously, typically used for perspective adjustments.
    static Pot3DFormat.Rotation
    Pot3DFormat.rotation()
    Creates a new, default rotation configuration builder.
    Pot3DFormat.Rotation
    Pot3DFormat.Rotation.x(double degrees)
    Sets the rotation angle around the X-axis.
    Pot3DFormat.Rotation
    Pot3DFormat.Rotation.y(double degrees)
    Sets the rotation angle around the Y-axis.
    Pot3DFormat.Rotation
    Pot3DFormat.Rotation.z(double degrees)
    Sets the rotation angle around the Z-axis.
